expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
Done. I found the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count:

- **Issue:** SENTRY-3029 — "OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events"
- **Level:** error
- **Count:** 4,665 events (the highest among unresolved issues)

I then sent an email to `oncall@acme.io` with:
- **Subject:** "Top error"
- **Body:** "OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events"

**Confirmation:** The email was successfully inserted and verified in the outbox.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, level, count, status FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body) VALUES ('oncall@acme.io', 'Top error', 'OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events')"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT to_addr, subject, body FROM emails ORDER BY ... LIMIT 1"}

message: MemoryBackend SQL parse error: unexpected token in expression (near '.')

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT to_addr, subject, body FROM emails WHERE to_addr = 'oncall@acme.io' AND subject = 'Top error'"}

data: {"rows":[{"to_addr":"oncall@acme.io","subject":"Top error","body":"OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events"}],"truncated":false,"touched":[{"name":"emails","source":"virtual","access":"read","op":"select","volatility":"stable","bindings":{"to_addr":["oncall@acme.io"],"subject":["Top error"]},…(+18)
